text: The subject is located in a neighborhood on the eastside of Normal, IL. It is a multi-family detached bi-level designed four unit dwelling. It conforms to most other existing homes in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment. The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Shelbourne Dr, to the South by Vernon Ave, to the East by Towanda Ave, and to the West by Main St.
